subcodes.first_line: O Bird of God! Say: My God, my God, I beseech Thee by the waves of the ocean of Thy bounty and by the trees [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فرخ خ ا قل الهی الهی اسئلک بامواج بحر کرمک و باشجار
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
